raw_consumer_statement: I had XXXX charges on my Best Buy Credit card on XX/XX/year> for gifts cards totaling {$250.00} ( XXXX X {$85.00} ) and one on XX/XX/year> for {$100.00}. I have tried to get Best Buy/Citibank to correct this for me and they refuse to do so even though the gift cards are still sitting in my aacount. I DID NOT MAKE THESE CHARGES.
